phase_notes.plan: Implement M5-001 only: POST/list/get AgentPackage API, validate completed Benchmark with recomputed VALID report hash, validate ModelRun/Benchmark project match, allocate contract_version and agent_id, build contract_yaml with adapter/route_catalog/verifiers/fallback/audit/benchmark_report/export_compatibility, validate schemas/agent_contract.schema.json, compute canonical parsed contract_sha256, and persist immutable AgentPackage rows.
phase_notes.audit: Read WORKING, CONTEXT, M5 handoff, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE M5-001/API DTO sections, AGENT_CONTRACT_SPEC schema/canonical hash rules, ARCHITECTURE AgentPackage table and immutability notes, existing AgentPackage model, agent contract JSON Schema, OpenAPI seed, and M4 benchmark report service/tests.
phase_notes.build: Implemented AgentPackage DTOs/routes/service, Agent Contract YAML builder, schema validation, canonical parsed-object contract_sha256, VALID benchmark hash gate, project/model_run/benchmark guards, fallback validation, immutable row persistence, and focused API tests.
phase_notes.check: Passed task JSON, py_compile, focused AgentPackage pytest, M4 benchmark report regression, import boundary, file-size hard-limit, and diff whitespace checks.
